title: BlockOps MCP Tool Catalog
description: JSON Schema for the 19 backend tools exposed to LangGraph / CrewAI agents via the BlockOps MCP server. Mirrors backend/services/toolRouter.js AVAILABLE_TOOLS + backend/utils/chains.js TOOL_PRICING. Pricing tier and x402_required are sourced from chains.js; see docs/x402.md for the full challenge shape. v1.0 contract surface (events + new entry points) is listed under `contracts`.

x_pricing_legend.free: No x402 challenge; the server executes the tool directly.
x_pricing_legend.paid: Server responds HTTP 402 with a payment challenge unless X-Casper-Payment-Deploy-Hash is present. Pricing is in motes (1 CSPR = 1e9 motes).

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get the native CSPR balance (motes + CSPR) for a Casper public key via CSPR.cloud.

public_key.description: Casper ed25519 public key (hex, with 01/02 prefix)

tools.name: transfer
tools.description: Sign + broadcast a native CSPR transfer via CSPR.click.

recipient.description: Casper public key (01/02 prefix) or account-hash-…

tools.name: batch_transfer
tools.description: Airdrop CSPR to multiple wallet addresses in a single deploy (≤ 25 recipients).

tools.name: deploy_cep18
tools.description: Deploy a CEP-18 (ERC-20-equivalent) fungible token on Casper Testnet.

total_supply.description: Total supply as a base-10 string (Cep18Token accepts u256)

tools.name: deploy_cep78
tools.description: Deploy a CEP-78 (ERC-721-equivalent) NFT collection on Casper Testnet.

tools.name: mint_nft
tools.description: Mint a new NFT into an existing CEP-78 collection (minter-only).

tools.name: get_token_info
tools.description: Look up a CEP-18 token's name, symbol, decimals, total supply via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: get_token_balance
tools.description: Look up a CEP-18 token balance for an account via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: get_nft_info
tools.description: Look up a CEP-78 NFT's metadata + owner via CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: lookup_deploy
tools.description: Look up a deploy's execution results via the Casper RPC.

tools.name: lookup_block
tools.description: Look up a block by height or hash via the Casper RPC.

tools.name: fetch_price
tools.description: Fetch CSPR market price (USD + 24h change) via CoinGecko / CSPR.cloud.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email via the BlockOps transactional provider (Resend / SendGrid).

tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Evaluate a math expression locally (no on-chain effect).

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an AI agent on the Casper AgentFactory contract. Signs a register_agent deploy via backendSigner (CASPER_SECRET_KEY).

tools.name: attest_agent
tools.description: Submit a positive/negative attestation for an agent. Signs log_success on the Reputation contract (1h per-attester cooldown applies; v1.0).

tools.name: get_reputation
tools.description: Look up the current reputation rating + success/failure stats for an agent.

tools.name: yield_rebalance
tools.description: Rebalance treasury allocation across Casper staking validators (off-chain computation + on-chain delegate calls).

tools.name: wallet_readiness
tools.description: Check whether a Casper public key is ready to receive on-chain interactions (CSPR balance, faucet eligibility, last activity).

contracts.description: On-chain Odra surface (entry points + events). Exposed here so MCP agents can reason about deployment shape, event payloads, and the new v1.0 security entry points (pause, ownership, treasury, burn). See contract/src/* for the authoritative ABI.

events.name: RevokeAttestation
events.emitted_by: attest_agent(agent, verified=false) when previously verified was true

v1_0_entry_points.name: transfer_ownership
v1_0_entry_points.effect: Rotates the owner field; controls set_paused.

v1_0_entry_points.name: set_paused
v1_0_entry_points.effect: Emergency pause — register_agent reverts while paused = true.

v1_0_entry_points.name: set_treasury
v1_0_entry_points.effect: Rotates the recipient of execute_payout transfers.

v1_0_entry_points.name: burn
v1_0_entry_points.effect: Decreases caller's balance and total_supply. Emits Burn.

v1_0_entry_points.name: burn
v1_0_entry_points.effect: Marks token_id burned, decrements owner balance. Emits Burn.

v1_0_invariant_changes.name: ATTESTATION_COOLDOWN_MS
v1_0_invariant_changes.effect: Enforced in log_success / log_failure — one attestation per attester per hour.
